examples: Every day a different chef will be conjuring up delicious dishes in the restaurant.
He amused the kids with conjuring tricks.
He is good at conjuring with silver COINS.
Neither sees anything unpoetic about conjuring the smell of cherries from beta-ionone, heliotropine and benzaldehyde.
Harley's success has forced its CEO, Jeffrey Bleustein, into conjuring up threats to the company's dominance.
